title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mindtree

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mindtree
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
